# Axis3d

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Axis3d;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Axis3d { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

gizmo, coordinates
